message:
fix(command,runtime): add WAITAOF parameter validation and replica rejection

- Validate numlocal/numreplicas arguments are non-negative integers
- Reject non-negative timeout values
- Reject WAITAOF on replica instances with proper error message
- Reject WAITAOF when appendonly is disabled
- Add 3 comprehensive test cases for argument validation,
  replica rejection, and disabled-AOF rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
